description: This file contains the implementation of the TwilioSmsProvider class, which implements the SmsProvider interface to send SMS messages via the Twilio REST API using Java's HttpClient. It manages configuration properties, constructs HTTP POST requests, and handles sending SMS messages with proper error handling.

classes.name: TwilioSmsProvider
classes.description: Implements SMS sending functionality using Twilio REST API, handling configuration, request construction, and error handling.

methods.name: TwilioSmsProvider
methods.description: Constructor initializing the provider with notification properties and creating an HttpClient instance.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Sends an SMS message via Twilio API using provided notification request, recipient phone number, and message content.

methods.name: url
methods.description: Utility method to URL-encode a given string using UTF-8 charset.
